title: poa gunnii
intro: Poa gunnii, also known as Gunn's fescue, is a species of grass that is native to the southwestern coast of Western Australia. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Poa gunnii are attributed to its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. Poa gunnii is often prepared as a herbal tea by infusing the leaves in hot water, or used in combination with other herbs in traditional medicine.
